mapper.insert: insert into recycleOrder(orderNo, userId, productId, addressId, productSnapshot, grade, appearanceDesc, functionDesc, estimatePrice, finalPrice, status, payType) values(#{orderNo}, #{userId}, #{productId}, #{addressId}, #{productSnapshot}, #{grade}, #{appearanceDesc}, #{functionDesc}, #{estimatePrice}, #{finalPrice}, #{status}, #{payType})
mapper.update: update recycleOrder set status = #{status}, finalPrice = #{finalPrice}, remark = #{remark}, payType = #{payType}, updateTime = now() where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select * from recycleOrder order by createTime desc
select * from recycleOrder where userId = #{userId} order by createTime desc
